scripts.deploy:gh-pages: VITE_API_URL=https://reparations-platform.onrender.com VITE_BASE_PATH=/Reparations-is-a-real-number/ npm run build && gh-pages -d dist -b gh-pages-react -m 'deploy: React frontend'
scripts.deploy: echo 'Use: npm run deploy:gh-pages — pushes to gh-pages-react branch (NOT the legacy gh-pages branch)' && exit 1
